tabs.deepDiveDisabledTooltip: Needs both tournament results and hand histories
charts.noDeepDiveData: No final-table runs found yet. Load matching tournament results and hand histories.
deepDive.finalTable.title: Final Table Runs
deepDive.finalTable.subtitle: Every final table matched to its tournament result — {{n}} found.
deepDive.finalTable.note: Built by joining tournament results with hand histories. PokerCraft keeps ~12 months of tournament results but only ~3 months of hand histories, so final tables from tournaments without a downloaded hand history are not shown here.
deepDive.finalTable.skipped: {{n}} joined tournaments aren't listed here (satellites, fields under 10, or busted before the final table).
chart.situation.ledger.title: Preflop Decision Profit by Position (Δbb vs. Folding)
chart.situation.ledger.caption.row: Each row is one action of yours from one of your positions, over n decisions — "3-bet vs. open · CO" means you 3-bet from the cutoff. The position is always yours, never your opponent's; for theirs, use the "Opponent's raise from" filter above.
chart.situation.ledger.caption.reading: Zero is folding — right of the line, the decision beat folding. Grey = the 95% interval includes zero, so that row cannot be told apart from folding.
chart.situation.ledger.caption.scale: Groups run from the smallest pot to the largest. Deeper spots make folding costlier, so they score higher by geometry alone — compare rows within a group, not down the chart.
chart.situation.ledger.caption.caveat: Chip EV (no ICM), and it includes your postflop play.
chart.situation.ledger.caption.tablePool: Positions pool every table size. Heads-up puts the button on the small blind, so the SB and BB rows blend heads-up hands with full-ring ones — split them with the "Players dealt in" filter above.
chart.situation.ledger.caption.hidden: Rows hidden below the minimum sample size: {{hidden}}.
chart.situation.ledger.caption.dropped: Hands skipped because their preflop action could not be read: {{droppedHands}}. This should be zero; if it is not, the chart is missing those hands.
chart.situation.hover.mean:
%{hovertext}
Average: %{x:.2f} bb vs. folding
95% CI: ±%{customdata[1]:.2f} bb
Sample: %{customdata[0]} decisions
chart.situation.family.rfi.desc: Folded to you, and you raised first in.
chart.situation.family.openJam.desc: Folded to you, and you moved all-in first in.
chart.situation.family.openLimp.desc: Folded to you, and you just called the big blind instead of raising.
chart.situation.family.overLimp.desc: Someone had already limped, no one had raised, and you limped in behind them.
chart.situation.family.isoRaise.desc: Limpers, but no raise yet — you were the first to raise, isolating them. (Compare Squeeze, where someone had already raised.)
chart.situation.family.flat.desc: You called a raise that nobody had called yet — you were first in behind it. (Compare Call vs. open + caller(s).)
chart.situation.family.threeBet.desc: You re-raised an opener, with nobody else yet in the pot.
chart.situation.family.callMultiway.desc: Someone had already called the raise before you, so you called into a pot that was already multiway. (Compare Flat / defend, where you were first in behind the raise.)
chart.situation.family.squeeze.desc: You re-raised an opener who already had a caller — the caller is squeezed between you. (Compare Iso-raise, where nobody had raised yet.)
chart.situation.family.callVs3Bet.desc: You had raised, someone re-raised you, and you called.
chart.situation.family.fourBet.desc: You had raised, someone re-raised you, and you re-raised them back.
chart.situation.family.callVs4Bet.desc: Your 3-bet was re-raised, and you called.
chart.situation.excluded.limpedCheck: free checks in a limped big blind. Checking there costs nothing, so folding is a line you would never take — and this chart scores every decision against folding, which makes that a bar clearing itself. There is no decision here to score.
chart.situation.excluded.isoRaiseBB: iso-raises from the big blind. In a limped pot the big blind chooses between raising and checking for free — never between raising and folding — so scoring it against folding inflates it and makes it incomparable with an iso-raise from a seat where folding is what you would really have done.
chart.situation.excluded.fiveBet: 5-bets or more. Too rare to measure at any single position, and the range is essentially QQ+/AK with no bluffs.
chart.handClass.title: Profit by Hand Class — {{family}} · {{position}} (Δbb vs. Folding)
chart.handClass.caption.reading: This breaks one row of the ledger above into the hands it is made of. Zero is still folding, and grey still means the 95% interval includes zero.
chart.handClass.caption.grid: Classes, not a 13×13 grid of individual hands: a grid splits this bucket into 169 cells with a handful of hands each, and a handful of hands says nothing about profit — one cracked ace moves a cell by fifty big blinds.
chart.handClass.caption.classes: Broadway = both cards ten or better (AKs, JTs). Connector = adjacent ranks, high card or not (T9s, 98s). Ace-x and broadway-x = one card ten or better, unconnected (A7s, K9s, Q7s). Gapper = close but not adjacent, no high card (96s). Trash = neither (95s, 72s).
chart.handClass.caption.caveat: Chip EV (no ICM), and it includes your postflop play.
chart.handClass.caption.inScope: Decisions in this action and position: {{inScope}}.
chart.handClass.caption.hidden: Classes hidden below the minimum sample size: {{hidden}}.
chart.handClass.caption.noCards: Decisions skipped because their hole cards could not be read: {{noCards}}.
chart.handClass.empty: No hand class here reached the minimum sample size. Lower it, pool the positions, or pick an action you take more often.
chart.situation.empty: No situation reached the minimum sample size. Try lowering it, or widening the filters.
